column1: # * and _ tokens). In Excel, *x repeats the fill char x to fill the column to
# its width. Ruling sheet.format.padding: the engine has NO column width (the
# typeset lane sets width downstream), so T0 emits the fill char EXACTLY ONCE
# at its position. The companion _x (skip a char width) is approximated as a
# single space (already an M0 behavior; included here for completeness).
